title: Heterogeneous Reservoir Computing Models for Persian Speech Recognition

heterogeneous_rc_advantages: Improved performance over standard RC models
Performance on par with LSTM in recognition accuracy
rc_characteristics: Good for processing temporal and spatio-temporal data

introduction.historical_context: Hidden Markov models and neural networks have been used for speech recognition
introduction.recent_advancements: Deep learning methods enabled by GPU and cloud computing
challenges: Need for more languages and dialects
introduction.rc_limitations: Performance in speech processing has been inferior to deep learning models
introduction.improvement_approach: Deep echo state networks to capture temporal context at different time-scales
